title: Technical Skills - KineticDev Portfolio
prompt: A dedicated 'Technical Skills & Infrastructure' page. Instead of a simple list, use an interactive or highly visual 'Skill Matrix' approach. Categorize by 'Full-Stack Web', 'AI & Voice Ops', and 'Cloud Infrastructure (AWS/Docker)'. Include a section for 'Technical Rigor' detailing the development philosophy. Use the Urban Kinetic dark theme.

title: Blog - KineticDev Portfolio
prompt: A comprehensive blog listing page for KineticDev, featuring multiple articles about Voice AI. The articles should cover: 1. 'The Voice Revolution: Why Your Website Needs an AI Agent' (Benefits for user experience and accessibility), 2. 'SEO in the Age of Voice: How Conversational AI Boosts Rankings' (Voice search optimization and long-tail keywords), 3. 'From Latency to Loyalty: The Business Impact of Real-Time Voice' (Conversion rates and retention), 4. 'The Future of Search is Auditory' (Trends in neural synthesis). The design should use the dark 'Urban Kinetic' theme with indigo accents, featuring a grid of blog cards with read times and tags.

title: SEO in the Age of Voice - Blog
prompt: A detailed blog post page for the article 'SEO in the Age of Voice'. The content should explain how voice agents capture natural language queries, reduce bounce rates, and improve local SEO. Include technical diagrams of voice search indexing and a list of actionable SEO tips for voice. Dark theme, high-readability typography, and a 'Related Articles' section at the bottom.

title: Blog - KineticDev Mobile
prompt: Mobile version of the Blog Listing page. A clean, vertical feed of blog cards optimized for mobile reading. Focus on the same four topics: Voice AI Benefits, SEO Optimization, Business Impact, and Future Trends. Indigo accents on a dark background.

title: Technical Skills - KineticDev Portfolio
prompt: Update the website name to "VoiceWebSEO" throughout the entire page. Replace the logo text "KineticDev" with "VoiceWebSEO". Ensure "KineticDev" is removed from all headers, footers, and body content, replacing it with "VoiceWebSEO" where appropriate. Keep all other layout and styling elements from the Urban Kinetic theme.

title: Projects - Light Theme (Mobile)
prompt: Restyle this screen to a LIGHT THEME. Change the background color to white (#FFFFFF). Update all text, headings, and labels to a dark blue or professional charcoal for high contrast against the white background. Update all accent colors (buttons, tags, icons) to a vibrant blue. Ensure project cards and navigation elements are optimized for a light theme. Preserve all images and project content.

title: Projects - KineticDev Portfolio
prompt: A high-fidelity 'Projects' showcase for KineticDev. Features a sophisticated grid of work samples, each with a focus on either 'Web Development' (React/Next.js) or 'Voice AI' (LLM integrations). Use the Urban Kinetic dark theme with glassmorphism cards, hover effects that reveal technical specs, and a clear 'View Case Study' call to action. Include filters for 'All', 'Web', and 'AI'.

title: Projects - KineticDev Portfolio (Restored)
prompt: Revert the color scheme from the light theme back to the original dark 'Urban Kinetic' theme. Update the background to #0b1326 (surface), use #6366f1 (indigo) for primary accents, and ensure all text, icons, and containers are adjusted for high contrast on a dark background. Maintain all existing project content and contact information in the footer.

title: KineticDev Portfolio - Desktop Home
prompt: A high-fidelity desktop landing page for 'KineticDev', a web developer and voice AI specialist. The design should be a responsive expansion of the mobile version, featuring a wide hero section with the professional portrait {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_2}}. Include sections for 'Web Development' and 'Voice AI Solutions' arranged in a sophisticated grid. Use a dark theme with glassmorphism, indigo accents, and clean typography from the 'Urban Kinetic' design system. Ensure the 'TopAppBar' and 'Footer' components are integrated. The layout should feel premium, technical, and spacious.

title: Home - Contact Form Addition
prompt:
Add a "Contact Me" section before the footer. This section should include:
1. A clear headline "Let's Start a Conversation" and a brief subheadline about collaboration.
2. A professional contact form with fields for "Full Name," "Email Address," "Subject," and "Message."
3. A primary "Send Message" action button.
4. Social link icons or contact details (email/phone) alongside the form for alternative contact.
Maintain the dark Urban Kinetic theme (deep navy backgrounds, high-contrast text, indigo accents) and professional styling consistent with the rest of the page.

title: AI Research - KineticDev Portfolio
prompt: An 'AI Research & Innovation' page for KineticDev. This should feel like a technical lab or research hub. Use data visualization motifs, neural network patterns in the background, and sections for 'Zero-Latency Voice Synthesis', 'Transformer-Based Models', and 'Cognitive Architecture'. Maintain the Urban Kinetic aesthetic with deep indigo accents and technical labels.

title: KineticDev Portfolio Home
prompt:
Generate a high-fidelity mobile landing page for a Web Developer & Voice Agent Specialist. 
- Hero Section: Use {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_1}} as the main hero image. Headlines: 'Precision in Code, Innovation in Voice'. Sub-headline: 'Crafting high-performance web applications and intelligent AI voice agents.'
- Services Section: 
  - 'Web Development': Modern, scalable, and responsive web solutions.
  - 'Voice AI Solutions': Custom AI voice agents for automated customer engagement and smart workflows.
- Skills Section: A grid of technologies (e.g., React, Node.js, Python, OpenAI, VAPI).
- About Section: Mention 'KineticDev' (the brand name) and the focus on technical excellence.
- Layout: Use the glassmorphism TopAppBar and Footer from predicted components. Dark theme with 'Urban Kinetic' styling.
- CTA: 'Let's Build Something Great'.
